case_title: SAMSON LEGESSE VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGESSE, SAMSON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY LEGESSE, SAMSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID MCDONALD. FILED BY LEGESSE, SAMSON GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARCO AURE--GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH MARCO AURE (TITLE: GENERAL MANAGER). $480.00 PAID TODAY IN OPEN COURT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY THE BALANCE OF $103.60 OR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR CAN RESCHEDULE THE MATTER AND ADD ADDITIONAL COSTS. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGESSE, SAMSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY AURE, MARCO (MANAGER, GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.) HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
